steps.title: Fit the line from the table
steps.content: Since the function is linear, two table points are enough. Enter $(1,54)$ and $(2,51)$ as lists and run $y_1 \sim m x_1+b$. Desmos gives $m=-3$ and $b=57$.

steps.title: Answer b
steps.content: In $g(x)=mx+b$, the value of $b$ is the $y$-intercept. The regression gives $b=57$, which matches choice D.
